TSMC Q1 2025 Earnings Call Transcript (Test Data)

Revenue: $25.8B (+35% YoY), exceeding analyst consensus of $24.2B
CoWoS capacity: Currently doubling production capacity in 2025 vs 2024
Advanced packaging CapEx: $12B planned for 2026, up from $8B in 2025
HBM demand: Customer demand for HBM-related packaging exceeding supply through 2026
DDR5 server penetration: Crossing 50% milestone in enterprise servers
Pricing: CoWoS wafer pricing stable with slight upward pressure due to demand
Backlog: Customer order backlog extends visibility well into 2027
N3 process: 3nm ramp on track, contributing 20% of wafer revenue
AI revenue: AI-related revenue now 15% of total, projected 25% by end of 2025
